title: The Crew Heads for Snow
description: On pages 17–18, the crew heads for snow as the crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom.
scene: The Crew Heads for Snow. The crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Hm? What's this long thing hanging out?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh hey, VIVI. How's Nami doing?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm... a tough one to chew through, aren't you...

summary: This part centers on the crew heads for snow, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
